events_summary: Lenten activities are in full swing, including Stations of the Cross on Wednesdays at 6:30 PM and the Fabulous Fish Fry every Friday during Lent from 4:00–7:00 PM. Join the SoulCore Lenten Series on Wednesdays at 7:30 PM in the Fellowship Room, and mark your calendar for “Songs of the Shadows” on Good Friday, April 3 at 7:00 PM. Volunteers are also invited to help with parish grounds cleanup on Saturday, March 28 at 10:00 AM (rain date Sunday, March 29 at 1:00 PM).
